name: Austin Petersen
subject: Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hey Friend, This is the last email I am going to send you before our big deadline. I am proud to tell you that we have reached just over 960 donors at this very moment. I am blown away by the FLOOD of support we’ve received. The ideas of free markets, liberty, and individual responsibility are still alive in this country. And people desperately wish to see them restored. I honestly don’t know what to say to everyone that is supporting my campaign. It is very humbling. Here’s the deal, Friend. I’ve got just under 40 more donors left to find. Have you donated yet? Even if you can donate just $5 it counts and I would be so grateful! We are so close. Don’t let me fall short! I’ve copied a few links below. Please donate whatever amount you can before midnight. **[Donate $5 Here>>>](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D053118_last%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D%26amount%3D5&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=053118_last&n=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Debbie=E2=80=99s_iPad?=
subject: need your eyes on this before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I reached out this morning about our deadline tonight. The team reached out yesterday. I'll be honest with you -- with Republicans spending $3 million on ads in Miami, the Koch Brothers running ads in May against me and the Trump administration up to their old tricks to defund Planned Parenthood, we must hit our goal. We haven't. Not yet, anyway. And we only have another 4 hours to hit our $22,000 May goal. If we take this race for granted and don't reach our goal by midnight, we can't push back on these attacks and run our usual aggressive grassroots campaign which helps Democrats up and down the ticket. [**_Let 's hit this goal. Please consider rushing in a contribution. Tomorrow will be too late. _**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f26/622b7b5b/1b14dd43/307b82eb/940502871/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180524f?refcode=dwse180524f_a&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie Sent from my iPad. Please excuse any typos
---

|

subject: Republicans' "reason for hope"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | News broke that new internal polls for Republicans show Sherrod's race against multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci**"within the margin of error."** | | | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad0/4462dc26/5351ba65/2007ed63/1477935607/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMxcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180531pm2?refcode=sbe180531pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
These numbers, according to a report in _The Hill_ , are giving "Republicans reason for hope" -- **and likely giving their special interest allies reason to spend big bucks in Ohio.**
But as long as we continue to fight together, one contribution at a time, we can keep Sherrod right where he is: fighting like hell for Ohio families in the Senate.
[_**We have a few hours left to reach our $400,000 goal. We have $6,791 to go to get there. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This campaign is about everyone, everywhere, every single day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Friends,
I'm grateful for your commitment to doing what this country needs from us at this critical moment, helping us to run a campaign that brings in all voices from all parts of Texas - regardless of party, geography or any other small difference. This campaign is about everyone, everywhere, every single day. And you are making it possible.
We've now visited with our fellow Texans in 253 of the 254 counties of this great state. Everywhere I go, I'm meeting extraordinary people who want to do great things for Texas and our country. Friday I got to meet Aurelio Saldaña, one of the members of the 1989 state champion six-man football team, at our Fort Hancock town hall. Later that day we were with more than fifty people who came out to be with us in Van Horn and then spent the end of the day in Mentone, population 19, in Loving County, where I had a chance to meet and listen to Stan.
_Meeting with Aurelio in Fort Hancock._
_Town hall in Van Horn._
_Listening to Stan in Loving County._
Every time you donate, you're literally putting gas in the Dodge Grand Caravan that we've been driving across Texas. There's no private jet -- I'm filling up the tank myself thanks to you. You're helping us show up everywhere and listen to everyone -- nobody's taken for granted, nobody's written off. And because of you, I have the chance to bring the people I meet into this campaign. They're joining our fight to do the big, bold, ambitious work that this state and this country need. In the next five months, we have to reach every Texan so they can join us too.
[**For those who have already contributed this month, thank you. For those who are thinking about giving, we're trying to reach our online fundraising goal of $100,000 by midnight tonight. It's critically important that we don't fall short on this one. Can you give a donation of $3 to help us get there?**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9216c/3b1d797/7e5523b8/35a845ff/3504537036/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180531-EOM7-RS&amount=3")
Your willingness to contribute right now will help us to reach our goal.
Reaching our goal helps us to reach the people of Texas.
And reaching the people of Texas helps us to win on the 6th of November, just a little more than five months away.
I'm counting on you. I hope that you'll come through again for us, for Texas and for the country.
Thank you.
Beto
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9216c/3b1d797/7e5523b8/35a845ff/3504537036/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180531-EOM7-RS&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9216c/3b1d797/7e5523b8/35a845f0/3504537036/VEsF/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you need to update your contact information, [ you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9216c/3b1d797/7e5523b8/35a845f1/3504537036/VEsC/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9216c/3b1d797/7e5523b8/35a845f2/3504537036/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Jacky
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Listen, I know you get a lot of emails about how important our November election is.
**But before we can get there, we have our May deadline tonight at midnight.** It's our last big deadline before our primary on June 12th, so this moment is crucial to show everyone the strength of our support.
Our race with Senator Dean Heller is neck and neck. If we're going to flip this seat - and take the Senate back for Democrats - we need to hit each and every fundraising goal. My digital director Laura just texted to let me know that we're coming up short of our $30,000 end-of-month goal right now.
****[That's just not an option. Give $5 - or whatever you can - before midnight when we have to close the books. Your contribution will go directly to repealing and replacing Dean Heller.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd47b/4fbb2af3/71ee9a10/5e8a0b4a/2205172055/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY5NS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk695-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Thank you for all you do,
Jacky

****
****

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd47b/4fbb2af3/71ee9a10/5e8a0b4b/2205172055/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd47b/4fbb2af3/71ee9a10/5e8a0b48/2205172055/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). clean_body: Listen, I know you get a lot of emails about how important our November election is. But before we can get there, we have our May deadline tonight at midnight. It's our last big deadline before our primary on June 12th, so this moment is crucial to show everyone the strength of our support. Our race with Senator Dean Heller is neck and neck. If we're going to flip this seat - and take the Senate back for Democrats - we need to hit each and every fundraising goal. My digital director Laura just texted to let me know that we're coming up short of our $30,000 end-of-month goal right now. ** "" Thank you for all you do, Jacky Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates. Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November. | | Hi Derek!

I've been keeping a close eye on our fundraising numbers, and I wanted to let you know that we're closing in on our goal, and I think [43 more donations](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13c1/3e0906/6743525c/3e34d379/4113252762/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180531_1_FR_JR_EOM-4&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+43+more+donations&utm_campaign=20180531_1_FR_JR_EOM-4&source=20180531_1_FR_JR_EOM-4") _could do it._

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: more important than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The books close on our end-of-month fundraising deadline in a few hours, and I'm not exaggerating when I say that it's more important than ever that we make our grassroots goal.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6339bd/1a8421e1/1a409b8cc/4b48d538/249352624/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Friends, The books close on our end-of-month fundraising deadline in a few hours, and I'm not exaggerating when I say that it's more important than ever that we hit our grassroots goal. We're really close, but I need another 14 of you to chip in before midnight to make it. [**Can you help me out and rush a donation before the deadline?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.31_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Here's why this one is so important: This month, the far-right started attacking our campaign in earnest because this seat is one of their few opportunities to pick up a seat in Congress. It's critical that Arizona families have an independent voice standing up for them in Washington, and this is going to be a tight race. We need to make sure we're firing on all cylinders through November. [**Please consider making a contribution before midnight so my campaign can keep going.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.31_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.31_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Troy
subject: last day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U
body:
I just spoke with my finance team, and they said we still need $1,750 to make sure our get-out-the-vote efforts are fully funded. This is crucial that we don’t come up short. With the primary less than 1 week from today, if there was ever a time for you to donate and show your support, now is the time.
| | | | [ ](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-r/)
---
Peter,
I just spoke with my finance team, and they said we still need $1,750 to make sure our get-out-the-vote efforts are fully funded.
**This is crucial that we don’t come up short. With the primary less than 1 week from today, if there was ever a time for you to donate and show your support, now is the time.**
[Help fully fund our get-out-the-vote operations.](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-y/)
[Chip in $10](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-t/)
[Chip in $25](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-d/)
[Chip in $50](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-k/)
[Chip in $100](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-o/)
We _have_ to get Jon Tester out of the Senate. He’s lost touch with the people of Montana and continues to stand in the way of President Trump’s America First agenda.
President Trump himself has said Jon Tester deserves to lose in November.
[](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-b/) | It’s time for Jon Tester to go, but I need your help to put us in position to defeat him this November.
[So chip in right now to show President Trump we’ve got his back.](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bsiryk-yhdyitiujj-p/)
Send me, Troy Downing, a combat veteran and businessman to defeat Jon Tester.
I need your help now more than ever. Thank you for your vote and continued support!
Called to Serve,
Troy Downing
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: It’s official - I’m on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
| | | With just 13 weeks until the primary election on August 28th, I need your help! Dear Friend, It’s official, we did it! Tuesday morning, we turned in over 2,400 signatures to the Arizona Secretary of State's office - that's more signatures than any other candidate in the Republican Primary for CD1! Thank you to my supporters across the district who signed my petition and to my wonderful volunteers and staffers who spent countless hours knocking doors, circulating petitions, and spreading the word about my campaign. I could not have done it without you! **But we are not done yet. With just 13 weeks until the primary election on August 28th, I need your help!** [**Donate $10, $25 or $50 today!**](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-nlkhdkt-jriylrtihd-y/) The stakes are high in District 1. We have a representative that votes with Nancy Pelosi any chance he can get, and has yet to meet a regulation or tax he doesn't like. Rural Arizona needs him out of office, and I am the only one that can beat him. While I have never run for federal office before, this is not my first encounter with the federal government. As a family farmer, I know firsthand the effects of government overreach and overregulation. I fought to protect rural Arizona’s water rights from environmental extremists, and protected many farms and businesses from a damaging property rights law. As a 4-H certified youth pistol instructor and an NRA certified youth shotgun instructor, I have devoted time and resources into teaching the next generation how to responsibly exercise their right to bear arms. To me, the Second Amendment is second nature. These are not issues that you can learn overnight, they take years of experience and knowledge and I have put in the time to master them. For too long, politicians from out of state have run for office in Arizona to progress their own careers rather than the lives of the people that live here. This trend needs to stop. I’m running for Congress because I want to bring real representation to rural Arizona. As a Member of Congress, I will continue to work hard protecting the interests of rural Arizona as I have my entire life. Help me give rural Arizona the conservative voice it deserves by sharing this email with your friends or by making a donation today! | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW →](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-nlkhdkt-jriylrtihd-j/)
---
Thank you again for your support!
Kind regards,
Tiffany Shedd

PS: Reply to this email with your address and telephone number to get your Shedd For Congress yard sign.

[](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-nlkhdkt-jriylrtihd-i/) [](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-nlkhdkt-jriylrtihd-d/)
* * *
Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

[Unsubscribe](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-u-nlkhdkt-jriylrtihd-r/)

name: The White House
subject: Unemployment reaches lowest level in 18 years
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451bbe1fccb5bf21684a6c530172389618e38386dfc1f470696c622efc0596f9e92a977db62e9dae411a83b241f5cedf0c79) The White House • June 1, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will preside over the Change of Command Ceremony for the Commandant of the U.S. Coast Guard. [Watch live at 11:00 a.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451b89392724d8f59f922f1b021ae1507005bd5b3414970a4b902e8beb5782d65f7d4b535a850cf89659e6b8d25867f79526) |
---
|

## Unemployment reaches lowest level in 18 years
**The United States economy added 223,000 jobs in May** , one of many recent indicators showing that President Trump's economic policies are paying dividends for American workers and businesses. Employment growth averaged 207,000 jobs per month in 2018- faster than the gains in both 2016 and 2017.
**Job growth in goods-producing industries such as manufacturing** , construction, and mining and logging have been especially robust. After averaging gains of 27,000 jobs per month during President Obama's second term, these industries have almost doubled the pace of hiring to 46,000 jobs per month since January 2017.
[ President Trump is overseeing a renaissance in manufacturing ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451bc4b3d74227a8544dcb6343362c15aeda3a6562749b7bcc0e200a4a0a8867585e4ad0f261e1eda09ea5260f39d0d16414)
**More:** [See the headlines about the flourishing Trump Economy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451bfa2961c6f04d754ccc5d250bc81ec0e97b8ad951577e0c9998de22b6c2fc3be5a39b5325e9dcab38d38cf6f1573562d4)

---
|

## What to know about steel and aluminum tariffs
**Yesterday, President Trump announced steel and aluminum tariffs** on Canada, Mexico, and the European Union following months of discussions to address U.S. national security concerns stemming from global oversupply. This implementation follows the President's March 8 announcement of a 25 percent tariff on steel imports and a 10 percent tariff on aluminum imports.
**In March, President Trump welcomed any country** with whom the United States shares a security relationship to discuss alternative means to address the oversupply challenge. As a result, American officials reached agreements with South Korea, Australia, Argentina, and Brazil on steel, as well as Australia and Argentina on aluminum. The U.S. was unable to reach satisfactory arrangements with Canada, Mexico, or the EU.
**Excessive imports threaten to impair national security** , the Commerce Department reported in January, for one key reason: Closures of domestic production result in a situation where the U.S. would be unable to meet demand for national defense and critical infrastructure in a national emergency.
[More on what you need to know about tariffs on Canada, Mexico, and the EU. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451b258d2bd1ccd8e9222f31c8b172aadd3aa3c5fb4a06de3868ef6d8c826ed1d7d09a138eaf0f690c304e092dda2c2f49fa)

---
|

## Get outside: June is 'Great Outdoors Month'
**"Spending time in the great outdoors** , especially during summer, is an American tradition," President Trump writes in his Proclamation of June 2018 as Great Outdoors Month. "Every American should take the opportunity to enjoy the beauty of our natural wonders, which stretch from coast to coast and beyond."
**The Trump Administration has made access to public land a top priority**. In December, President Trump stood with local communities against Federal overreach on land management, modifying the boundaries of the Bears Ears and Grand Staircase Escalante national monuments in Utah. The Administration also "opened or expanded hunting and fishing access at 10 national wildlife refuges across the country," the President wrote this week.
**As part of an effort to boost exercise and youth fitness** , the White House also hosted a field day with several hundred children, parents, and athletes on the South Lawn this week. [Watch Ivanka Trump's video from Sports and Fitness Day.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451b92627171c1bb39aa4db3ce0b8ea85562684347796d7eff6a76902fe6c9388e4b2a4c758a9b060dd73045588e0a3c018c)
**Read** : [President Trump proclaims June 2018 as Great Outdoors Month](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451b246ac5df34416026e2b7319a9ca3c07a533915a8c30a932ba495d43ad63ee57f8cc31d4e7534630da90cb8b975673e39)
**More** : [The Administration stands with communities against Federal land overreach](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451b5d73e580b7f1937b21d95cd0f8ea07e49310273e499241d08f533ba442eea59859e24e369c8178cf7831976a3b0b3dc4)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**Marine One** | May 29, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451b7f3f41e8d90d03d7b6ff85ee96f28f68838228c9bf0684380e8788e62289515eeed9594dd9e026e0755612284031b559) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ea7cbe292d42451bc403aae59a8b4d34abd3f66b82fbe679ca95e482846be1f7e82a06edbaf1eaac3f4bfffebd07e2aea689c6207c9c529d) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d40d6164a97955c8a65bcaf0979f6380b3578736ce572dc397071302e149f059be985d2a5115f6cfd4880255c38efaa9f922a32ae37cfba05c)
---

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: I won't stand for this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
President Trump just launched his latest attack on a woman's right to choose, pushing forward a new rule that would defund Planned Parenthood clinics nationwide and guarantee that women are no longer told their full range of health care options.
**This is like something out of another decade - no, another century. So yes, I'm furious. And I'm hoping you are too.**
The tens of thousands of women here in New Hampshire and the millions across the country who rely on Planned Parenthood for lifesaving care deserve better. No politician should be able to dictate a woman's health care choices. It's that simple.
**[If you agree, I need you to click here right now to automatically add your name and tell Donald Trump: We'll never stop protecting women's health care!](http://surveys.signforgood.com/CJS-womenshealth?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk859-su-nd)**
Thank you for this - let's keep fighting the good fight.
Jeanne
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=s2rEkIJ%2BbY6SaDDf8jzbrFvCFnFtl8gx&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Shaheen for Senate

body:

Unfortunately, Scott Wagner isn't quitting his gubernatorial campaign -- instead, he just resigned from the state senate so he can spend all of his time trying to defeat Governor Tom Wolf.

**But the truth is, Wagner has been serving special interests and big campaign donors instead of doing his job for a long time.**

Just last week he skipped critical floor votes on legislation designed to protect children from predators, domestic abusers, and deadly chemicals in order to attend a corporate policy summit hosted by the Republican Governors Association to benefit big business.

We can't let a Harrisburg insider like Scott Wagner into the governor's office. This is a man who told Pennsylvanians he'd "be sitting in the back room with a baseball bat" in Harrisburg, and that things "are gonna get a little bloody."

But it's not just his violent rhetoric that's scary -- it's also his long record of supporting public education cuts, rolling back health care for hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians, and throwing seniors out of their nursing homes.

We can't afford to let Scott Wagner become our next governor, but the only way we can stop him is by hitting each and every fundraising goal before November -- especially this one. And there's no way we can do it without your support.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Opinion: Building the Best Education System in the Country
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/philscott/opinion-building-the-best-education-system-in-the-country?e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| **Building the Best Education System in the Country** By Governor Phil Scott
Undoubtedly, many of you are aware of the disagreement between me and the Legislature over increasing statewide property tax rates. As I’ve said, I cannot accept an increase in statewide property tax rates and here’s why: I ran for office understanding state government needed to focus more of our efforts on making Vermont more affordable and growing the economy. Last year, with the help of the Legislature, we passed a budget without raising a single tax or fee, without cutting services and while investing in economic growth. It was the first time this was achieved in decades, and we did it while addressing revenue shortfalls. This year, we have a total of $160 million more in revenue than we did last year (much of it from increasing economic activity) which includes at least $44 million in surplus tax revenue. This is excellent news. So, I just don’t understand legislators’ insistence on raising statewide property tax rates when we don’t have to. From my perspective raising taxes should always be the last resort. And that’s why I vetoed the budget and tax bills. But education taxes are only one part of an important challenge we must address. Vermont has great schools, teachers and staff. By most measures, we deliver a good education to our kids. But we _could_ have the very best education in the country, if lawmakers have the courage to face the reality of our current situation and rethink the policies of the past. Our education system is being weakened by a decline in our working-age population and an increasingly inefficient system that’s diverting budget dollars away from kids. The K-12 system was built to educate more than 100,000 kids. Today, we’re educating about 76,0000 – that’s 27,000 fewer in 20 years, and declines continue. Our student-to-staff ratio has decreased from about seven kids for every one adult to about four to one. Meanwhile, the State has increased property tax rates (on top of local rate increases) virtually every year – often faster than growth in Vermonters’ paychecks and property values. Even since Act 46 of 2015, which streamlines school governance, costs grew by more than $60 million while the number of students decreased by about 2,000. These trends have contributed significantly to the affordability crisis many families face, persistent inequality between districts, and expanding inefficiencies that divert millions of dollars away from our kids. To be very clear, my focus is not on cutting spending – it’s about spending money far better than we do today, so we can do more and make our education system the very best in the country. Think of it this way: We are now spending more than $1.6 billion to educate 76,000 students. [According to the National Education Association](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=93847b7d07&e=19cebfe173), we have, by far, the largest per-student investment in the country, spending double the national average. We have a good graduation rate, but our student test scores are only two percentage points higher than the national average. We are not making substantial gains in improving outcomes for disadvantaged students. And only about half of our high school graduates go on to receive a technical or trade credential or earn a college degree. Outcomes and funding from school to school remain alarmingly unequal. We have some schools offering a wide range of foreign languages, environmental studies, cutting-edge science, technology and engineering programs. And we have other schools that can’t offer any of these opportunities. It's time to have the courage to admit we can do much more for our kids, achieve better outcomes and attract more families. That’s why I’ve proposed a plan to stabilize statewide property tax rates for five years, work with districts to make structural reforms and free up hundreds of millions in additional savings to invest in more opportunities for our kids. Preventing statewide property tax rate increases would also help homeowners and renters get ahead and make it easier for employers to grow and create more good jobs – generating additional organic economic growth and, with budget discipline, more surpluses. Change can be difficult, and I know how hard it is to reconsider long-held views. But if lawmakers truly care about increasing quality and decreasing inequality in education, they must have the courage to rethink the way we’ve always done things, break the cycle of constant increases in education tax rates and persistent inequality between schools, and reform a good system to make it the very best in America. ###
---

name: Jason Yates
subject: Your roadmap to the 2018 primary elections
body:
| | Together let’s make a difference with our votes
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Farticles%2Fyour-roadmap-to-the-2018-primary-elections%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=1)
| Peter, The primary season is upon us! Our latest newsletter is dedicated to ensuring you are prepared to pray without ceasing, in season and out of season, and you are ready to cast your vote in the primary elections. I truly believe God will use both our prayers and our action to advance His Kingdom this primary season. Let each citizen remember at the moment he is offering his vote...that he is executing one of the most solemn trusts in human society for which he is accountable to God and his country.
-Samuel Adams, American Statesman and Founding Father 1\. Know Why You Vote Do we view voting in the same way as founding father Samuel Adams did? As a solemn trust in human society - a decision of which we are each accountable to God and to our communities and our nation? We have in large part wrongly lumped voting with politics. But here’s the truth, **the act of voting is not political, it is our sacred responsibility.** Voting is a privilege that sadly much of the world does not enjoy. It’s God’s blessing entrusted to us. We have the freedom and ability to choose Godly leaders to govern our communities and our nation. The framework of our political system provides the greatest opportunity to select Godly leaders in primary elections. It’s important for Christians to vote because the primaries will determine what the ultimate options are in the general elections. So if you want to have a say so later, you need to have a say so now.

-Dr. Tony Evans It is in the primary elections where we Christians have the greatest flexibility to cast our vote for the candidate we like best. During the primaries, we are not forced to choose between two or three candidates, but instead, have numerous candidates to choose from. And frequently at this stage of the election process, there are many strong Christian candidates who uphold Judeo-Biblical values. Yet, it’s at this critical phase of the election process – primary elections - that so many Christians neglect to vote, either because of apathy or busy schedules. A recent study conducted by the Washington-based research firm Lake Research Partners and released by The Voter Participation Center found that roughly 40 million people who voted in the 2016 presidential election will not cast ballots in the 2018 midterm elections. And it’s easy to assume that even fewer will vote in the primary elections. 2\. Know What Will Be Decided It’s hard to believe the primary elections are already underway across the nation. Texas and Illinois had their primary elections in March, and the rest of the other states will decide what candidates are selected to run in the general election in November. The sheer magnitude of the number of elections taking place in 2018 is staggering. Over 8,500 elections are taking place this year, which makes it the most consequential election year in decades.
* All 435 seats in the United States House of Representatives will be up for election. There are many close races, leaving the control of the House up for grabs in this election.

* And 35 of the 100 seats in the United States Senate will be contested. The Senate will likely have at least one, if not two, Supreme Court Justices to approve, making these races critically important.

* In November 2018, 87 of these 99 state legislative chambers are holding general elections for a total of 6,066 seats—roughly 82 percent of the total state legislative seats in the country.

* There are 906 school board seats up for grabs across 25 states (in the top 1000 districts). Collectively, these districts serve 12 million students

Many are closely watching the primary U.S. Senate races in Arizona, Florida, Indiana, Michigan, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nevada, Tennessee, Utah, West Virginia and Wisconsin to see which contestants will win their party support in these hotly contested races and earn the opportunity to have their names appear on the November ballots. 3\. Know How To Vote Make sure you take time to view a sample ballot for your district and research the candidates to learn what they stand for in light of Biblical principles. Then mark your calendar for Election Day! Sign up for your free [personal voting assistant](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fmpva%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=2) which provides voting reminders, locates your polling place, assists with voter registration and absentee ballot requests. Together let’s be faithful with the incredible responsibility God has entrusted to us. It’s time to stand boldly and informed at the ballot box and vote for leaders who fear God and uphold His principles! When you become entitled to exercise the right of voting for public officers, let it be impressed on your mind that God commands you to choose for rulers just men who will rule in the fear of God. The preservation of republican government depends on the faithful discharge of this duty.
-Noah Webster, known as the "Father of American Scholarship and Education" You are to be God’s salt and light. Your voice is needed to be a source for good in your community. And remember, voting is not only our civic responsibility, but it’s our Biblical responsibility. John Quincy Adams said it best, _“Duty is ours, results are God’s.”_ Together, let’s be faithful this primary season with the blessings God has entrusted to us -and vote! To read other articles from our latest newsletter [visit our website!](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fnewsletters%2Fvol2-issue1%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180601com01&n=8)

All 435 seats in the United States House of Representatives will be up for election. There are many close races, leaving the control of the House up for grabs in this election. And 35 of the 100 seats in the United States Senate will be contested. The Senate will likely have at least one, if not two, Supreme Court Justices to approve, making these races critically important. In November 2018, 87 of these 99 state legislative chambers are holding general elections for a total of 6,066 seats—roughly 82 percent of the total state legislative seats in the country. There are 906 school board seats up for grabs across 25 states (in the top 1000 districts). Collectively, these districts serve 12 million students Many are closely watching the primary U.S. Senate races in Arizona, Florida, Indiana, Michigan, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nevada, Tennessee, Utah, West Virginia and Wisconsin to see which contestants will win their party support in these hotly contested races and earn the opportunity to have their names appear on the November ballots. 3\. Know How To Vote Make sure you take time to view a sample ballot for your district and research the candidates to learn what they stand for in light of Biblical principles. Then mark your calendar for Election Day! Sign up for your free which provides voting reminders, locates your polling place, assists with voter registration and absentee ballot requests. Together let’s be faithful with the incredible responsibility God has entrusted to us. It’s time to stand boldly and informed at the ballot box and vote for leaders who fear God and uphold His principles! When you become entitled to exercise the right of voting for public officers, let it be impressed on your mind that God commands you to choose for rulers just men who will rule in the fear of God. The preservation of republican government depends on the faithful discharge of this duty. -Noah Webster, known as the "Father of American Scholarship and Education" You are to be God’s salt and light. Your voice is needed to be a source for good in your community. And remember, voting is not only our civic responsibility, but it’s our Biblical responsibility. John Quincy Adams said it best, “Duty is ours, results are God’s.” Together, let’s be faithful this primary season with the blessings God has entrusted to us -and vote! To read other articles from our latest newsletter United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

body:

---
Pride Month is here and we have the perfect way for you to celebrate with us!

**Shop our brand-new Pride collection at the Official Democratic Store -- hurry up and place your order before we run out.**

[](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522d6c/4067b0a/5b02dafad/7fb8773c/3565340133/VEsH/ "https://store.democrats.org/collections/pride?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em_20180601_dnc_dnc&source=em_20180601_dnc_dnc&refcode=em_20180601_dnc_dnc")

Happy pride shopping,

Sara

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Drain the swamp?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Imagine a city where everyone thinks the same, wears the same power suits to work, goes to the same restaurants for lunch and spends their weekends...

Friend,

Imagine a city where everyone thinks the same, wears the same power suits to work, goes to the same restaurants for lunch and spends their weekends hobnobbing in the same million-dollar townhouses. This city cherishes bureaucracy, elitism, liberal politics and is obsessed with consolidating power and isolating itself from the rest of the country.

It sounds like a nightmare, but this city is real.

It’s Washington, DC, and it’s high time we really drained the swamp.

That’s why I’m proposing we relocate the headquarters of most government agencies out of D.C. and into real America, right next door to the people they’re supposed to be serving. [**And Friend, I want you to join me.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID0MmeCRLUHCpiDKKzgCXB3KrSG5-IP6yDPP1BNXbEsIQaM-ByqhsLf-q8dm3-MiKYtS1T4ZA2z9lat7Qh-Xq2EPR-BVsYU0JRntwwmDvpZu1G1jFv3RYlqgETL3eCotUgIQFUSFJFi4gS4bFssBRVGSsx1wGvlx1nKXkWRr3C376Kz_FGxSHIV5u5xP9qQLxpT67mxqu3OLknA0zfQURn6hxbK8uCrs9Phvt2jA0Xr7luI4JhbBStrqC_jKqSsBlfLB70JGtljPZ7ht-noPGYoxTmGmzzNfyvj-h6T0PdQ86A9xslNt7iEx8kyxmOnxVhudTCPuQnFXhN8gYomtc9W3o6KS9XvcMslJMesqcdweCc8SFd5WXubBIt7DkBd5_KbqvZdexyPsR28WSAZfvf1U%3D)
[ADD YOUR NAME: DRAIN THE SWAMP >>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID0MmeCRLUHCpiDKKzgCXB3KrSG5-IP6yDPP1BNXbEsIQaM-ByqhsLf-q8dm3-MiKYtS1T4ZA2z9lat7Qh-Xq2EPR-BVsYU0JRntwwmDvpZu1G1jFv3RYlqgETL3eCotUgIQFUSFJFi4gS4bFssBRVGSsx1wGvlx1nKXkWRr3C376m3fj1ULNHKEwbIQL5MNdzNWhuyFMzNMJPZL4qkUSxW9-qBhpGvedTdszUFIbQ3tjWiJEQd0XisbPT2vvmaSjQYYAM2QAG2o6BBlj9sg7pthNl82bmORcaJ4SDl4VsYth3sc968vE7DscNBHVjhzr1_wFeevGkxh0l99L8_Ax3_A-4fPqAO4jBtTjo0ju1xbXEZk2dy2PAIUUP7JHUbqHxEUNBa7K1NpP0uc5XT7pCUY%3D)
---

It’s clear Washington is way, way out of touch with the rest of us. Six of the wealthiest counties in America can be found in the greater Washington area where fat cats and career politicians are cashing in, and we’re paying the price.

Enough is enough!

Americans elected President Trump to disrupt the permanent political class and drain the swamp. But fixing government simply by changing personnel isn’t enough. We need more sweeping change, and this would be a good first step in addressing the REAL problem.

By moving the Department of Agriculture closer to farmers, the Department of Commerce closer to small business owners and the Department of Veterans Affairs closer to veterans, we will improve responsiveness and lead to more efficient policymaking. We’ll shift power away from Washington and finally begin popping the bubble that’s shielded the D.C. elites for too long.

Moving bureaucracies into the communities they’re supposed to serve will bring down operational costs, and we can also pay wages in line with a more reasonable cost of living, saving taxpayers millions while improving efficiency and agency know-how. It's a win-win-win.

By taking bold steps, we can finally return power to the people.

Please, join me in my call to drain the swamp by adding your name here: **[https://leahvukmir.com/drain-the-swamp/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID0MmeCRLUHCpiDKKzgCXB3KrSG5-IP6yDPP1BNXbEsIQaM-ByqhsLf-q8dm3-MiKYtS1T4ZA2z9lat7Qh-Xq2EPR-BVsYU0JRntwwmDvpZu1G1jFv3RYlqgETL3eCotUgIQFUSFJFi4gS4bFssBRVGSsx1wGvlx1nKXkWRr3C376cHssOIutNtwJrWjJXZSU9d9PhzcK6Br2cyrexokTm7pBGx-a5-lu03Dl75OYA0TMSjhNiW1iaOkO11BGAYyC4apXWRGhh83dwwTNwTOl0dvCVVTU-x9mazJDBgWe_rFKm1G1z_P5tEMKQ76oKENZOOczcxkLcmh-k0yRItmO2ykK6mNnSErozuCoQqQWPwytWpdz0OH4GruXqCVniNXr4kjDZlm-hc7NTZrEeEPEjyM%3D)**

It’s time to flush out the coastal elitism, bad ideas and top-down liberal policies that have corrupted policymakers. Let’s move government into real America and among the people it’s supposed to serve. That's how we make America great.

Thanks, Friend.

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6IDz2L3dkkyAmKDQuknJH7Txx4nFzfK1tk-vHgPr7jKrgjMfMh7qWct7SWRhTB3lmTnV9ogQhKkY8ZEcD0UzI5-PRlfUFXNUBLCxfM5iPrKLrulO9zEG2sPfEVz4Yyws60Pwvoq7xoCPx5pYBGAAqsDT3Ht4nKRyggsBWMpYRyVqdB9-2oR754pKE8DBjtn5H0U7wgWZEUc_6XodsWT8BnDEXlbJ9OvSgZij4JdVOyp-qyrDHjh0cNycPmuCguEtsLeA%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID9iTKb65_TolYjlHgk7xSQaqhrDwk2kPIVsFJUMOanxUVZO7i76cPPXzqjavnnJEHUlSPXAyjD263IxQC7RIRp0FYe1i4I4dQsu-WJFF7J08Im1gEJX0btVKxEi19qjOoc8LLgFF0xbhQkkhR7pQRucMjZQ3-cuPSIBJImkIgGuJb6Elr7NCUKMOwqhVQkWBJiTOwv7XPLmdLROQDycmo8Fziunawr1plm1ajkn6ic6OKHapsnf0Hldq9QwiCUpClA%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=-Xb6icXAkjhj9yPtFxAnR-o2WxRLf1gYkmHw0FuwOigJcrLfu7_2LIo0qmmD5EP5ORSAuX_-UrTn-v4e7BP_TDG56HTPdpX8BbJ_zni8RWza_Lm-b-qlLB7u3cHYERHtO0jSpY3fNlkr5GCfRJPwiZb1xkz4DgrjbVGnUVOz4NwQQf34n0woyehjszRH2muMU2unNN3IK9jn_4l-f9Igrzww8CyaQVTrJ3rBDbQmU8CvMWVsjvK27ZwjaGlo0xzm). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID5Y-4MqkO6fKXCxpk_We7gBkYZQ6MY5A37eQS9-JspV-FzzSdpwu39hz3nqxbJqGwzO31KanhjKhfV2ZcgCQaa9APwjxfErB0wdGUIDlvPt5x0ImNyGuw0l1vlIVOJLZj2IJadfBXvAXQjudBcZXxK4kd6qr6T2h1NVca_K624NSsc65Ip_7QaJZJY8zC-QdyUEP3Wx2wyFf6eVx6FgYEow-rHt93EM_xZZ7hsjDfFDC2pwInBUeJSs8LbTv_hKqVTMIXizI7IW34y9c4uUmMm60yzZls43bJt-MeDyOPvRGd5VRN7gnGFI2mJPHox8T-T74wCdBd4bLR7YCcOVBLED8XAO3j-viuLi97qYGiM_f) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID5Y-4MqkO6fKXCxpk_We7gAqXtA2vpbZdRlznZ4GZIkKwr3oF_uB55kCxNA-857hzeWgoi2Flm7pQMdP9kiiQQZ687RRLZV51N4VD0Y1m6hcN-IejdQ7dMx9ZQhn6o4xy4dDLgrMam4MISytq6EhEAgC60_6ap07rZ--FXPkLLSVgJ6paYusWqgwc0hkyCjKkuiXOrAhOUny5jhAMja5z-iP0RZZt3Nyj0qNLpwf96ISPobSh_vrOS3FHG76xQTDKwi9lhQylUa2Lf2g623tZnNa-YNxkrU4UwL2r1oR6GFRZ7A70vi4iSGp4LhsS7ol2Z33f5YCXhS_ddBfs8STAPJgJwtHAGa0N3Ev9Q1uSflq) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6IDz2L3dkkyAmKDQuknJH7Txx4nFzfK1tk-vHgPr7jKrgjHOLf2x93VP-5r_APtiZlBkfKDClHhFKHsL7c8prjGHr05shRo9VFz7xDxtL38bklBUXujJipmXjcHYWRlfmwZFwttTkY_leC42xw1UluFYKM5O0yge6e_roTSjNPh47gaIM-WVC6jtnN2pqPkRIlloAZCfSKQAnh1RI-Lm98qOMj7tnWA2G-lBwNa73Btes9hH88fpAmrsQG4wxL9M4GHQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID9iTKb65_TolYjlHgk7xSQaqhrDwk2kPIVsFJUMOanxUrJEr02KM7-Vlft_npSBXW_-FRjrNEWYZk-1LhLwDgTCRXTg67lC30TnQXsuZA75omnwgT34Hd6NCPBVRrFw8cbo3REKoB_SAoHVAYnaG2UWy5f8YbGyqK4kDJOLS28NKemueD0x52aLlSpgvZcyGdf-hAVXU2kEYH9wiE82hmdxrSwiSdmv00nbO4FvCCWzkeqdmolRdcUv2jYvldVyFIg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID5O4Mi0gsf-uBU5y5atYpfbIjMKm2eDknrKYX8uP_qGATVxSN1NgJHwrh2QXrZ98H39YjP3Kyln8QKWOofH2NgiJ45AIqYOQ3T8eEyQijHvl0MdCW137W9vfX3-lo3eDkB5qG1V_mbq74uL3v0DkWcdg31N7X9mNpXZxh6AB7u45-4ZDPaSK7NCgSbBPjFwJSQykFTZyyMqgVpSha-9BZer7roLjsMwXxypt3DgBjMIOHUWyNldW9_dtwDDjDq3kMQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=w7-EbFdtMI7-3DFbcd6ID5Y-4MqkO6fKXCxpk_We7gDElzr1g2TzOnT2kEm4LzE8CZwyqH4oTPlL-Nzl0YJrKChh66qhyUihu-gvH3njQqVpSMdnEDyb6lDoJ141JbzDaXstDPWYk9lT7TkqxBPOEReG7UpHCILiE35qa184jBIA2-Am4fkuMc4JjQ95eZOa-Y-2IcvA0ahyEurCymPnVxEOqAzPlGtfPmeaCPvNqWQOeLWn-2KkVQoA7rYCOXG2GUVsCZzdCCYkAWqCHGDWdviq1hNgmUHWeG-RiyRMJEsc678GGMwY-DISKulipLyadG49DU2NWJG74QJvkJyqKLAFbY2PlURibLnBii9v-fFE2Y6EPd4aShX8dxIGS3OdnIo9i3Wh1zX5N8ooJKSKCw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=-Xb6icXAkjhj9yPtFxAnR-o2WxRLf1gYkmHw0FuwOigJcrLfu7_2LIo0qmmD5EP5ORSAuX_-UrTn-v4e7BP_TDG56HTPdpX8BbJ_zni8RWza_Lm-b-qlLB7u3cHYERHtO0jSpY3fNlkr5GCfRJPwiZb1xkz4DgrjbVGnUVOz4NwQQf34n0woyehjszRH2muMU2unNN3IK9jn_4l-f9Igrzww8CyaQVTrJ3rBDbQmU8CvMWVsjvK27ZwjaGlo0xzm) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=08f492c27daf4051a805dfae4b488dc5&_e=-Xb6icXAkjhj9yPtFxAnR-o2WxRLf1gYkmHw0FuwOigJcrLfu7_2LIo0qmmD5EP5ORSAuX_-UrTn-v4e7BP_TDG56HTPdpX8BbJ_zni8RWza_Lm-b-qlLB7u3cHYERHtO0jSpY3fNlkr5GCfRJPwiZb1xkz4DgrjbVGnUVOz4NwQQf34n0woyehjszRH2muMU2unNN3IK9jn_4l-f9Igrzww8CyaQVTrJ3rBDbQmU8CvMWVsjvK27ZwjaGlo0xzm) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
All for one, and one for all.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a633/7ab0e2c4/7f85a63a/349bb0d5/2210610686/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/10155779525309436/") Friend, Happy Pride Month! This June, folks across the country are celebrating LGBTQ+ pride, and we're taking a second to remember when Maryland became the 7th state to pass marriage equality back in 2012. As president of the NAACP, Ben made marriage equality a major goal and made sure the organization fought to ensure that anyone could get married, no matter their sexual orientation. [**Take a second to watch this video looking back on the fight for marriage equality here in Maryland, then share with your friends and family on Facebook.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a633/7ab0e2c4/7f85a63a/349bb0d5/2210610686/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/10155779525309436/") [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a633/7ab0e2c4/7f85a63a/349bb0d5/2210610686/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/10155779525309436/") | [WATCH & SHARE »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a633/7ab0e2c4/7f85a63a/349bb0d5/2210610686/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/10155779525309436/")
---
Ben's the kind of guy who doesn't shy away from the fights that need fighting. His motto is: All for one, one for all. That's the kind of leadership he'll bring to the Governor's Mansion, too.
Thanks,
Jerusalem

Deputy Communications Director
Ben Jealous for Governor

**" Paul Ryan wades into Indiana's Senate race"**
\-- _Bloomberg_ reporter Peter -- Paul Ryan, the man who wrote the plan to end Medicare as we know it, just weighed in on Indiana's Senate race -- and he's asking Hoosiers to "give us Mike Braun." **Tell Paul Ryan NO. Why does Ryan want Rep. Braun in Washington? **Because Rep. Braun will vote for the Paul Ryan agenda hook, line, and sinker.** That includes:
* More tax cuts for the ultra-rich on the backs of the middle class
* Privatization of Medicare and Social Security
* Anything President Trump wants -- absolutely anything!

Ryan isn't the first Washington Republican to meddle in Indiana. President Trump and Vice President Pence were both here to rally in support of Rep. Braun. Mitch McConnell has been raising Rep. Braun money from his special interest allies. And the Koch brothers and Karl Rove are spending big.

**But Ryan 's involvement could mean a new, HUGE influx of outside spending. We have to fight back to defend Joe and protect the programs that Hoosiers are counting on -- like Medicare, Social Security, and HIP 2.0.**

**[Pitch in now to stop Paul Ryan and Rep. Braun from taking Indiana's Senate seat!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21c3/7377f838/3c0e9873/51f90be5/3267169618/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fight-back-june?refcode=20180601nd&amount=10")**

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Trump's pardon power is not unlimited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
If it sounds like this is an abuse of presidential power, it's because it is.
#
Peter -
Yesterday, Donald Trump issued another pardon. This time for Dinesh D'Souza, who pled guilty to violating campaign finance law by illegally funneling money into a Republican campaign.
This wasn't a normal pardon. Neither was his pardon of racist Sheriff Joe Arpaio. Sooner or later, Trump may decide to pardon people tied up in the Russia investigation or connected to his shady business deals.
If it sounds like this is an abuse of presidential power, it's because it is.
**But his power is not unlimited here. Our system has a check on this power: state attorneys general.**
Trump cannot pardon people for state crimes. And for a lot of his associates, there are plenty of questions about not just which, but how many state laws they have violated.
The New York Attorney General sits squarely at the center of many of those cases. It's her job to seek justice, no matter what Trump does.
That means our next Attorney General must be unquestionably independent and willing to prosecute the lawlessness of Trump, his family and his associates to the full extent. If I am elected AG, I will make this a priority. There will be no doubt that I am serving only the people and the law.
There are powerful people and wealthy interests who know this, and it's why they don't want me anywhere near this office. They are likely to spend unlimited sums of money to stop us. We need to work together to prepare for whatever they throw our way.
**[So, if you can, please make a $3 donation to our campaign today. We have a lot of work ahead of us, but with the people behind us, we will win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e26/6e822e2f/18ada31c/41721374/4141379538/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDEtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-pardons?refcode=em180601-a")**
There's a suspicious thread connecting many of the pardons Trump has issued or is considering as well -- many are for some of the crimes his associates are currently being investigated for.
D'Souza admitted to violating campaign finance law. Michael Cohen is under investigation for the same thing and more. For people like Cohen, Paul Manafort, and Michael Flynn, Donald Trump seems to be signaling that he's willing to pardon them for whatever federal crimes they've committed while he also tweets about how he doesn't think people will flip on him.
Here's the thing: Trump's corruption is happening right in front of us.
We're in the midst of a constitutional crisis, and while the daily chaos of this administration can feel overwhelming, it will be our next AG's job to stay focused on bringing them to justice.
I've spent years leading the fight to enforce anti-corruption laws and uphold the anti-corruption principles embedded in our Constitution. Our democracy is at stake, and I will not sit quietly by as our president tries to destroy it.
**[That's why your $3 contribution is so important. If we can win our campaign for Attorney General, I will not hesitate to hold Trump accountable -- no matter what tricks he may pull.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e26/6e822e2f/18ada31c/41721374/4141379538/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDEtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-pardons?refcode=em180601-a")**
\- Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e26/6e822e2f/18ada31c/41721374/4141379538/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDEtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-pardons?refcode=em180601-a")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e26/6e822e2f/18ada31c/41721375/4141379538/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e26/6e822e2f/18ada31c/41721376/4141379538/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Again, thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for the support you’ve shown our campaign in the last few days. My team tells me that with your help, we didn’t just meet our monthly fundraising goal -- we surpassed it.
In the last few weeks, we’ve seen a lot of developments in this race. Our momentum has continued to grow as we campaign across the state and get our message in front of Tennessee voters.
But out-of-state money is being funneled in to support my opponent, who has continued to ramp up divisive attacks. And Washington politicians have begun to fix their attention on our race, trying to bring the same partisan division that’s created the gridlock in Congress here to Tennessee.
I’m thankful that I can count on supporters like you to give our campaign the resources we need to tune out the hyper-partisan rancor and stay focused on the issues that matter to Tennessee families, like making our economy work for working people and fighting back against the opioid epidemic.
With your continued support, I know we’ll be able to take our message voters from now to Election Day.
Thanks for being a part of this campaign.
—Governor Phil Bredesen

Our momentum has continued to grow as we campaign across the state and get our message in front of Tennessee voters. But out-of-state money is being funneled in to support my opponent, who has continued to ramp up divisive attacks. And Washington politicians have begun to fix their attention on our race, trying to bring the same partisan division that’s created the gridlock in Congress here to Tennessee. I’m thankful that I can count on supporters like you to give our campaign the resources we need to tune out the hyper-partisan rancor and stay focused on the issues that matter to Tennessee families, like making our economy work for working people and fighting back against the opioid epidemic. With your continued support, I know we’ll be able to take our message voters from now to Election Day. Thanks for being a part of this campaign. —Governor Phil Bredesen = PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209

name: Tina Smith
subject: Say you're with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I know no person can do it alone. That's why I'm asking for your help. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b64f/c1f7015/6860037a/11428192/2049021390/VEsH/ "https://tinaforminnesota.com/") Friend, In just a few hours, DFLers from across Minnesota will arrive for our state convention in Rochester to do the important work of organizing our party for victory in November. Part of this critical work for delegates will be voting on who they want to represent our party in this U.S. Senate race. This seat isn't about one man, woman, or a political party. It belongs to all of us. It belongs to the activists who've been organizing their communities for decades and the people who are here at the DFL convention for the very first time. It belongs to the people we fight for -- the neighbors whose voices we believe should be heard. I'm running for this seat because my parents raised me to believe that if you're truly going to be part of a community, it's not just about mowing your lawn, saying hi to your neighbors, and paying your taxes. You have to find a way to get involved. That means when you see a politician who isn't listening, a problem that needs solving -- you get out there and fight to change it. That's what I want to keep doing in the United States Senate. But I know no person can do it alone. That's why I'm asking for your help. I'm asking for your voice. I'm asking for your hard work. [**Will you add your name here and say you 're with me before tonight's convention vote? I truly believe in the power of people, and I know the only way we can win is with every single person going all-in to do it.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b64f/c1f7015/6860037a/11428193/2049021390/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180601_convention?source=rtw_180601_convention_em-C") I can't imagine doing this campaign without you. Tina **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b64f/c1f7015/6860037a/11428194/2049021390/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180601_convention_em-C")**

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Friend,

**Polling Update**

Since my last update, two more polls were released showing Joe Manchin with a double digit lead over Patrick Morrisey. There are now three polls that show Joe with a commanding lead.
**May 2018 Polling** | Manchin | Morrisey
---|---|---
[Global Strategy Group](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAt5cAj3quTUSB0iDQUxSITXzDOsj9Oudze86ogSA9mFuHiXQhNvWld84237DZ4hPV%2fex2NE0I4MztBxVqBTNyGSFW3W7hzPE33AEv53b4koBRYkOjxaTRkl3WHGizm4ZyTFN4a6%2becdhI%2bQAt7hZunrnOf5ynGw0LOd2ciSq24iKQ%3d%3d) (Manchin Campaign) | 50% | 42%
[Hart Research](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC43DCBP8ZTn3v8p5DymU3NmzFYnro7qdPc7r5Uf1ZGByJau0fiSzOdHeYbvUm%2fQNCwt9bpHsYPB2IjF8IP39R6b7tcQUzVYJAnHFKsIIVUMhELTH5Jj8w0cPgqMtOGZlB%2fo5rKcrTB4RfG%2fEj45CSWCP2IReySIi0ImZqO7uT%2bawKSznIh6aAvQsPjxoOPV381A%3d%3d) (DSCC) | 52% | 40%
[Gravis Marketing](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKValk1jbGScRhsUI%2bd8aDvT0x5rGWqg%2bMPOtfNzMzw%2bygHBja6rTDtzwUanBkKr%2b%2f3pw%2b1dqF6X%2brTrcipTKvXpv9ilYn4m%2b4HGmNLMhc5kk3iBJR3C36ZdHNm6oajx4s9oWPPGj9mJ0hWDhnQ0Hzrdn99Hbs7Pq6ZHbXrYWuE5IgHO7QmClbElGVDW%2blyQ9c1wTL1J9pqRfx%2fxDpS0en5nMaslW6%2bidPV4hHKN4YpwE) (Republican) | 53% | 40%

While Patrick Morrisey has been damaged by the blistering Republican primary, Joe Manchin's connection to West Virginians is strong.

** Joe on the trail**

Joe honored our veterans by marching in the Grafton Memorial Day parade. This weekend Team Manchin will be in Monroe County for the Farmers' Day parade.

We also had a tremendous turnout for our Friendraiser in Wheeling this week.

**Joe in the News**

Beckley Register-Herald: [Manchin working to ensure state broadband map coverage is accurate](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKQkTFXbMcbVr3AQbkpNLf%2fELnnkBt9deR%2buqMN8KSGD%2fXAjpa5MJkK7dc32cmmexRW077icvOgnNaowRjp4DujnBpN80pAFCTIyHcYVK%2fWcLA7lXOUzw2K8VLQx7SPKAE5i%2fyFINjNz6fvopdXbgxqVPlN%2ftz4%2fgU00HC%2fCA1Ux11F78pRMtY%2b6YnNrUglhtOjKvZL0Cpd1td0PmuEuwGka2gx0g0b%2b4lURQdklp3qguzPcXIe9JuS88xR%2b6vve2qME%2baj%2bLAAh8)

The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has granted U.S. Senator Joe Manchin, D-W.Va., a waiver to participate as a challenger in the Mobility Fund Phase II challenge process, to make sure that broadband coverage maps in West Virginia are accurate.

Fox News: [Manchin calls out new show for for portraying 'vicious stereotypes'](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKX0F6L1phUKSr2ghtBosF2%2b%2f3sp7eQkuIxBsv2takuygCsSuans0amuQpD%2bSFjfjoKVqKK1B4TdEbhJtkbdxYORGAB3dY84TRtYjK06mABLPI4qqu5SrJ%2bUmuIs%2fbf%2bPqJ9zbDkzk5srDiJ8bc0NAyP4q5qKavI1xuGvaqDf6hQPKSrx6xWGoDJFAPi0g53xA0x7VM%2bLAldsZ6P1BBhxaAnsoDRAGoIcdrc%2faOzMa3FCi3BuKGaqB5A1Wg63fUrr6Q%3d%3d)

A series called "West Virginia Wilder" is under fire by West Virginia Sen. Joe Manchin, who wrote a scathing letter slamming the show after he watched the official trailer and voiced his disapproval with the way his state and its people are being depicted.

Wheeling Intelligencer: [Manchin meets with steel workers
](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKcvCUINtMjzHCn%2bJPNmqtH9Sn9cl6AEOIxInskFBGlLOH3T7j%2bzpJ6PLllgq6K4MzRXIKe3D2vFIJkH9oTw6QNFp637TPXSE46cr9tidrKdU6uoVlwPTN%2bMnXc1G83PALUuMEbu%2ftiK51BC0Hf3Hcb2lME3PxZYFavgQ3Oa9WYAN%2bNnqWyibOvgfDfHc%2f%2fb48Hn28Dsaa5L6IOEAHotmpIyetFyE%2bplgJzGkq1NBQAMW)
While Manchin visited Wheeling, the Trump Administration announced it would impose steep tariffs on steel and aluminum on member countries of the European Union. The American government has been seeking to impose tariffs from 10 percent to 25 percent on steel producing countries throughout the world.

Thanks,

Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

[P.S. Don't miss this letter to the editor that highlights the need for working families to back Joe. ](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKWzMJcOdTGW4vdFuTXcd9P0kUJG1H%2fOraPrid2HjWuY%2fS1HaGPdXw%2fZJGnRJXDCZELqmoHiaPeSHQmGkb0b1UaHMUqACwqyQYDNFYLTHpiR8dEeZ%2fSDhouoYfqWWYp1XLgs9UqAMKak7Wnm%2bM%2bUZ7r7zQ20GW%2baQohV%2bv%2fMnGuptchD0i1DTc0dSpIvim9WMYf4kecvpRialHebtZCyyxjBJccpyISF1rwOtJANJEA2UAMLnKjzgxZV5TPfC6xB9A%2bQsu%2fpiBQNH)

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTjvDXRuLbXMKT3SLPHL8f66seeqvDN0HKv0yZtvicTJBHji0Rx3fpXm%2fh2PIGbpA56ZmM8ZFXvbp1NGeD8qcDsppJfQufYNAiO%2f3aS9exDIflZShJNKH%2b%2f5EW%2fieuBVvDi7Hg%2b1MwdGPOrZ1HzceM1upMoY8CT9MHWWGmAtsqhcO34NOK8h4mnPdC4SBN8fJiKhRWvdSPf3g%2fjQ9vLbpmf1ntpqyYZIwmRFUSBCSKp4sg%3d)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Read Our 2018 Party Platform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We are excited about our upcoming 2018 Indiana Republican Party State Convention in Evansville. For those of you who will be joining us - we look... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/read-our-2018-party-platform?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| Dear Fellow Republicans:

We are excited about our upcoming [2018 Indiana Republican Party State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d60a205eba&e=1acd9bb3d6) in Evansville. For those of you who will be joining us – we look forward to seeing you. For those of you who can’t make it – you’ll be missing out on a jam-packed two days of fun and fellowship!

The reason that I am writing you all today is because a member, or members, of our 2018 Indiana Republican Party Platform Committee leaked the drafted platform to the media and some or all of it will likely be in the paper in the coming days. That’s a significant breach of trust, of course, and one that puts all Indiana Republicans in a very unfair position. You shouldn’t have to read about the platform in the paper before you get it from the Platform Committee.

So, we’ve decided to do things a little differently this year and rather than wait to distribute the drafted platform at convention, and then post it on our website after it's adopted, we have put the draft document on our website one week in advance so you can see it for yourself.

Here is a [direct link to the proposed platform](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3732b6640f&e=1acd9bb3d6).

No editorializing, no pontificating, no bias or manipulation, as we are sure some will do. Here you just have the words themselves in black and white.

Thank you,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

---
| [READ THE 2018 INDIANA REPUBLICAN PARTY PLATFORM](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=df92ed8480&e=1acd9bb3d6 "READ THE 2018 INDIANA REPUBLICAN PARTY PLATFORM")

For those of you who will be joining us - we look... | | | | | | Dear Fellow Republicans: We are excited about our upcoming in Evansville. For those of you who will be joining us – we look forward to seeing you. For those of you who can’t make it – you’ll be missing out on a jam-packed two days of fun and fellowship! The reason that I am writing you all today is because a member, or members, of our 2018 Indiana Republican Party Platform Committee leaked the drafted platform to the media and some or all of it will likely be in the paper in the coming days. That’s a significant breach of trust, of course, and one that puts all Indiana Republicans in a very unfair position. You shouldn’t have to read about the platform in the paper before you get it from the Platform Committee. So, we’ve decided to do things a little differently this year and rather than wait to distribute the drafted platform at convention, and then post it on our website after it's adopted, we have put the draft document on our website one week in advance so you can see it for yourself. Here is a . No editorializing, no pontificating, no bias or manipulation, as we are sure some will do. Here you just have the words themselves in black and white. Thank you, Kyle Hupfer Chairman, Indiana Republican Party | "READ THE 2018 INDIANA REPUBLICAN PARTY PLATFORM" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2018 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Team Morse
subject: Three ways you can help Jessica now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/z08SeKDjk-p3QZSO4aQeFEwxIX5nHxSvXcH1vYeUBiQ=/okjsllxhUaFV_DdV1iF7HMerLSHTQVIoaN6UJVpNOm4=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180601_TM_field-3_all_logo)

Team, you've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with us all the way through this primary, and the finish line is in sight. We're so grateful for all you've done.

But now, with just a few days left, we need you to help us bring it home.

**Here are three ways you can help us out in this critical final weekend of the primary:**
* Join us for our 10-county tour--we're holding events to get out the vote in every county across the Fourth District leading up to Election Day. [_**Come to an event and help get the word out.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/z08SeKDjk-p3QZSO4aQeFEwxIX5nHxSvXcH1vYeUBiQ=/VfSe2C5-Csa8_67ITZKK5Iv2SlDpiueHkAbw3eD3ZZo=)
* Make sure everyone in your community knows you support Jessica--[_**endorse her on Facebook**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/z08SeKDjk-p3QZSO4aQeFEwxIX5nHxSvXcH1vYeUBiQ=/b9Zrmi7hbXfJnpwSakFQewrDTZjK-mL2BC3WNrFV5Ys=).
* Fighting as hard as we can for every vote takes resources--[_**chip in now**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/z08SeKDjk-p3QZSO4aQeFEwxIX5nHxSvXcH1vYeUBiQ=/B6dzXxXOXMvabrwZQR2tvHr-qR1LJ_3L07NB89LgQTY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180601_TM_field-3_all_l1).

If everyone on this team steps up to do one--or all!--of these things, we'll be in a strong position come Tuesday.

Once you've stepped up, can you forward this email to three family members or friends who may be wondering how to help out this weekend?

Thank you,
Team Morse

**[CONTRIBUTE>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/z08SeKDjk-p3QZSO4aQeFEwxIX5nHxSvXcH1vYeUBiQ=/okjsllxhUaFV_DdV1iF7HMerLSHTQVIoaN6UJVpNOm4=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180601_TM_field-3_all_contribbutton)**

name: Tim Kaine 2018
subject: Medicaid: A victory in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Elections matter.

[On Wednesday,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cc/3e0906/64a6963e/3e34d71c/3862856318/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/medicaid-victory?source=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+On+Wednesday&utm_campaign=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid") the Virginia General Assembly voted to expand Medicaid. The vote was bipartisan, because frankly, it was the right thing to do.

Expanding Medicaid in Virginia, and across the country, is possible when we elect strong supporters of expanding access to health care at every level of government.

[Stand with us to say you support expanding Medicaid and electing people that get it done.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cc/3e0906/64a6963e/3e34d713/3862856318/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/medicaid-victory?source=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+us+to+say+you+support+expandi&utm_campaign=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid")

**In 2017, Virginians were clear:** We are going to elect new types of leaders, ones that represent us and our families. And this week, we reaped the benefits.

Now our leaders will take the next steps to implement a plan to officially expand Medicaid in Virginia and send the message to other states to follow suit.

[Are you with us? Sign on to say you support expanding Medicaid - in Virginia and beyond - and that you're going to stand with candidates that champion that fight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cc/3e0906/64a6963e/3e34d712/3862856318/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/medicaid-victory?source=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Are+you+with+us+Sign+on+to+say+you+suppo&utm_campaign=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid")

Elections have consequences, Derek.

Last year, Tim spent a lot of time on the road campaigning for Governor Northam and Democratic House candidates, helping to spread their promise of Medicaid expansion. He invested his own time because he knew the major impact their victories would have down the road.

And this week, they delivered. We moved a major step forward in expanding access to health care because of what we were able to accomplish on [November 7th, 2017](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cc/3e0906/64a6963e/3e34d711/3862856318/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/medicaid-victory?source=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+November+7th+2017&utm_campaign=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid") \- Election Day.

Our team is fired up and ready to win again on [November 6th, 2018,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cc/3e0906/64a6963e/3e34d710/3862856318/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/medicaid-victory?source=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+November+6th+2018&utm_campaign=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid") because while a victory on election night is something to celebrate, the multiple victories that can follow for Virginia families is what we're really looking forward to.

Always happy to celebrate the victories along the way with you, Derek.

_Tim Kaine 2018_ | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cc/3e0906/64a6963e/3e34d717/3862856318/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/medicaid-victory?source=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180601_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid")
