name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: 19 in May, how many in June?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Just this week, we saw our support of progressive Virginia Delegates Elizabeth Guzman, Lee Carter, and Jennifer Carroll Foy get us closer to making sure every person has access to health care.
#
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab34/bed43eb/6b6a1057/75fdd899/4053865919/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180601-full&noskip=true")
[**25 "new blue" candidates have won this year. Will you chip in to help the rest of our endorsed candidates win? Give $7 now to make sure the most progressive candidates represent Our Revolution on the ballot this November.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab34/bed43eb/6b6a1057/75fdd899/4053865919/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180601-full&noskip=true")
Friends,
In May, Our Revolution members made an average contribution of $17.12. Thank you to everyone who chipped in. Your contributions have been put to good use helping progressive candidates win 25 primary elections for governor, Congress, state legislatures, and local office all across the country.
Just this week, Our Revolution-backed progressive Virginia Delegates Elizabeth Guzman, Lee Carter, and Jennifer Carroll Foy moved the dial toward Medicare for All by voting to pass a Medicaid expansion that will give health care to 400,000 people. And we're far from done. We have the momentum to win more elections going forward, and in four days, voters are heading back to the polls.
[**You can turn our party a new progressive shade of blue. Each $7 contribution helps hundreds of volunteers text, call, and canvass to get out the vote for progressive candidates in California, Iowa, New Jersey, New Mexico, Alabama, and Montana between now and Tuesday, and keeps this positive momentum going.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab34/bed43eb/6b6a1057/75fdd899/4053865919/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180601-full&noskip=true")
These races are going to be close! We have 24 more amazing candidates on the ballot, and they are relying on you, not corporations or special interests, to help fund their campaigns. **They need us to challenge establishment influence at every level of government.** ‬
**Jane Kim** is running for mayor of San Francisco. **Cathy Glasson** is running for Iowa governor and **Gayle McLaughlin** for California lieutenant governor. Our candidates are running for Congress, secretary of state, district attorney, the state legislature and more. **The stakes are high --we can't let a single office go unchallenged.**‬
[**‪There are just four days before these races are decided. Can you pitch in $7 to help Our Revolution volunteers get out the vote in these elections?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab34/bed43eb/6b6a1057/75fdd899/4053865919/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180601-full&noskip=true")
The status quo won't do. Establishment politics and establishment economics won't do. **Any old blue just won't do --it's our job to demand better.**
With your help today, we can change the political landscape and pave the way for a more progressive future. Thank you for being a part of this political revolution.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab34/bed43eb/6b6a1057/75fdd899/4053865919/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180601-full&noskip=true")**

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab34/bed43eb/6b6a1057/75fdd89b/4053865919/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: 45 wins in May. 48 women on the ballot on June 5th alone >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c453e/24c69fd9/1ae389160/1881cba7/2121251137/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact")
---

Peter,

Primary election season is flying by FAST.

Nineteen states and D.C. will hold primary elections in June alone.

By the end of the month, we'll be _over halfway_ through state primary elections for this year.

That's a whole lot of elections to win, and our women will be counting on this community to have their backs through them all.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win in primary elections up and down the ballot in June.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c453e/24c69fd9/1ae389160/1881cba0/2121251137/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180601_email_HalfwayPoint?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact")**

In just four days, we have our biggest primary election day of the year -- Super Tuesday -- with 48 of our women on the ballot in primary and special elections.

Helping our women through these tough primaries next week and throughout June could determine whether Democrats can flip state legislatures, governorships, and even Congress.

We hit the ground running in May when we helped 45 women make it through their primaries. Let's keep it going.

**Donate $3 to continue this winning streak and help pro-choice Democratic women with elections in June:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Win-June-Elections](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c453e/24c69fd9/1ae389160/1881cba1/2121251137/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180601_email_HalfwayPoint?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWinJuneElections&utm_campaign=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c453e/24c69fd9/1ae389160/1881cba2/2121251137/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180601_email_HalfwayPoint?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFER02N_digital_email_20180601_HalfwayPrimaries_inact")

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Just stepped off the stage...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi there,

I just stepped off the stage at our state party convention in Rochester to accept the nomination for U.S. Senate and I am energized by what I just saw here tonight.
I see Minnesota. I see that tenacity that gets us through the cold of winter. I see the ingenuity that makes us home to some of the best companies and workers in the world. I see the humility that keeps us working together, searching for common ground.
We've accomplished a lot, from building bridges and rail, to standing up for health care, to expanding apprenticeship opportunities, and strengthening our economy.
But our work is far from finished.
We must lower the skyrocketing cost of prescription drug prices. We've got to focus on keeping jobs in America and making things here. And we need to get dark money out of politics and restore the Voting Rights Act -- because in democracy done right everyone has a voice.
**Can I count on your support to continue our important work?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VyQwy6C9K0loGdn9NcsySf5S%2FFgQde8c)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ANk3TtQ6nOjReYvOvNCSP%2F5S%2FFgQde8c)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UHLyjEtk%2FTg3TtIC3p8Ik%2F5S%2FFgQde8c)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=g9YvIWHaHQyg%2BKyzewu8J%2F5S%2FFgQde8c)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=naaxoLfkI3O39flG8BzBmv5S%2FFgQde8c)****

I am honored to have your support and I will work every day to keep getting things done for Minnesota and our country.
Thank you for all that you do,

\-- Amy

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JUNE 1st**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
Dear Derek,
For as long as I served in the Senate, Republicans had been working diligently to assure that the integrity of our election process was beyond reproach. Through the years, we were able to make some baby steps towards that effort. Republicans across the state were heartened when the 2016 election cycle delivered majorities in the House, Senate, and Corner Office. FINALLY, we could address the ambiguities that exist in current law. The idea that someone who votes here should be treated the same as all New Hampshire residents surely is appropriate.
Yesterday, House and Senate leadership submitted arguments to the Supreme Court on the constitutionality of House Bill 1264. This piece of legislation helps clarify our voter laws, by clarifying the terms “resident,” “inhabitant,” “residence,” and “residency.”
In a joint press release with Speaker Chandler, Senator Morse said, “This legislation ensures that individuals who choose to become part of New Hampshire by voting here are also abiding by the laws governing our state.” Makes sense. [For the full text of the press release, click here.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyMu9NHzTR86id69SrjrOv11iDhR8TDN9IOhngUxG9jjvIwXUG0r6YmdAX1W8YlAFOFK6h-2F8lsPigAp50v8tnarlks0s4XJ0wk0y6bIDzVthU75Gx7wBOivNU-2FSRSPM2LkMTXxCY3vJz-2FqnixpXlbUVY-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M3N7FmREkMtq3A0R96vmAIFfhr8S5a6-2Ftrvd54DglvRkUQmkLZSiEIBHfNvdkOielM4ZXfZuBqwf2Fb0jrmm2ox8Xh5fkpPmL4lT4JX76krWL5NvxcVE8Mma9XL7hfPdoXmQtlG839HOFSFtqdq-2FgZ-2BkrSEMFizN6lfXgoOySdW9oGbQXQcr5KvVNgETdkM2HgyDBavAgrJlKNh9hbsVoHwhuBFaleMAubZHJLUZBJvasSHH1zLbKhNNrqZHzcpZKO9TQZP3xIB2EVPn1vhNHNA-3D-3D)
We look forward to the Supreme Court’s advisory opinion in support of HB1264.
\--------------------------------
2018 Candidate Training is right around the corner!
We’ve scheduled two workshops for candidates. These workshops will include a wide range of topics, from a review of the Republican Platform to fundraising & finance, data access & management, social media & messaging and more!
Our first workshop is on June 21st at the NH Institute of Politics from 6 p.m. to 9:30 p.m.

Our second workshop is on July 27th at Plymouth State University from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m.
Watch for final details and feel free to call if you have questions.
Sincerely,

Jeanie
**Join the Grassroots Circle!**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JUNE 1st | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, For as long as I served in the Senate, Republicans had been working diligently to assure that the integrity of our election process was beyond reproach. Through the years, we were able to make some baby steps towards that effort. Republicans across the state were heartened when the 2016 election cycle delivered majorities in the House, Senate, and Corner Office. FINALLY, we could address the ambiguities that exist in current law. The idea that someone who votes here should be treated the same as all New Hampshire residents surely is appropriate. Yesterday, House and Senate leadership submitted arguments to the Supreme Court on the constitutionality of House Bill 1264. This piece of legislation helps clarify our voter laws, by clarifying the terms “resident,” “inhabitant,” “residence,” and “residency.” In a joint press release with Speaker Chandler, Senator Morse said, “This legislation ensures that individuals who choose to become part of New Hampshire by voting here are also abiding by the laws governing our state.” Makes sense. We look forward to the Supreme Court’s advisory opinion in support of HB1264. \-------------------------------- 2018 Candidate Training is right around the corner! We’ve scheduled two workshops for candidates. These workshops will include a wide range of topics, from a review of the Republican Platform to fundraising & finance, data access & management, social media & messaging and more! Our first workshop is on June 21st at the NH Institute of Politics from 6 p.m. to 9:30 p.m. Our second workshop is on July 27th at Plymouth State University from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. Watch for final details and feel free to call if you have questions. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHTS UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK Governor Chris Sununu swearing in Sarah Stewart as the next Commissioner of the Department of Natural & Cultural Resources earlier this week! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week is Anne Galbraith! Anne is our intern through our new Ambassador Petrone Internship Program, created through the generosity of Augusta Petrone. Anne has been a great help in the office since she started with us and we're excited for her summer at NHGOP! TWEET** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

Our grassroots team stepped up in a huge way and we might actually close our fundraising gap. [_**We 're just about $5,000 away from being on track.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad7/4462dc26/537bb160/2007d25e/811964851/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJzYmUxODA2MDFwbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiIzMGQifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180601pm?refcode=sbe180601pm_30d&amount=26") We all need to step up. _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kimberly Padilla
Subject: I wish I could send you something positive_
I'm sorry I have to send bad news before the weekend. I wish I could send you something positive.
**Unfortunately, I can 't. We came in short on our May goal. We need to make up for lost ground immediately.**
Missed goals are signals of weakness to Sherrod's opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, and special interests.
A poll has this race within a single point and frankly, we can't lose any more ground or miss any goals.
**The good news is we can get back on track -- but that requires your help. Here 's the game plan: We're launching a 24-hour fundraising push to get as many $26 donations as possible.**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Stay safe: Ute Park Fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | Friend,

As we learn more about the Ute Park Fire that is spreading in Northern New Mexico, I want to take a moment and encourage you to stay safe.

The Red Cross is one of many organizations that can help with any questions you may have about evacuations, staying out of harm's way, or helping those who have been impacted by the fire.

**[Learn more about the New Mexico Red Cross and how to contact them by clicking here.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/2wA/ni0YAA/t.2hy/m93aB-l-Re2ntkX9CSEjpA/h0/gRzYkISZ-2BxiF6-2BuEcR6Ca6h-2FteBsJgMpvepsR6KbJux6GzqMKTti2F5T4NAjCe4QnF4yQsBnNXWOQS5bg87lqf-2BbRofN-2FqWkPg9Otrk2W5P6BuhVnmV5mFMvC-2BFMEeXlOazdQvK-2FG1AOgHqmFk20-2BXo6WwUj0oN-2BM02egdQDM4KibrRmrzWO2RFEBsuE3lsAkFxUaOBp95ej760iiklLJhqG8KTqMt-2BHDoH3AX3QL1zttFpM3FOmN9bs2pN0rOluxBByKEhQm-2BAZhZDZUhLxoj-2F008naS9Ff82GpSvdiwkT6flAEtQ57lhZ7q-2FjreHpZ)**

I will continue to monitor the situation, and I extend my thanks to the first responders who are fighting this fire and helping our communities in their time of need.

Sincerely,
Martin

---

| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/2wA/ni0YAA/t.2hy/m93aB-l-Re2ntkX9CSEjpA/h1/55uI0ZjpoLA9-2FYhqE-2F4Eitwb7nFGaBM-2BttuyqSTdMS4-3D). name: Jay Inslee
subject: Where are the children?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's time to act: Join the National Day of Action for children displaced by Trump's administration.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd791d7/2f5ea88d/70eb5873/2cbcfe2a/994184070/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/children-day-of-action?utm_source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&utm_campaign=children-day-of-action&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **Children have become the victims of Trump's America.** What we're learning is horrific: In one of its cruelest actions, the Trump administration is forcibly taking children away from their parents as migrants try to cross the US-Mexico border. Hundreds of children have been ripped from their families. According to Customs and Border Protection, 658 kids were separated from their families in the first 13 days since Attorney General Jeff Sessions green-lit the program. The ACLU has just released horrifying details about the abuses these children are subjected to in immigration detention. [**Friend, around the country today tens of thousands of Americans are uniting in a National Day of Action for Children. Please join me in signing our petition demanding the Trump Administration stop separating families. Add your name here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd791d7/2f5ea88d/70eb5873/2cbcfe2a/994184070/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/children-day-of-action?utm_source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&utm_campaign=children-day-of-action&utm_medium=ema") Few things can be more despicable than a government-sanctioned operation deliberately breaking up families on American soil. These heartless acts under the guise of official policy by the Trump administration cut across what America stands for and the hope our nation is supposed to offer. Trudi and I are heartbroken knowing this is happening in America today. All of us, whether we are parents or not, should be outraged knowing children are being torn from their parents on the direct orders of our federal government. **Torn-apart families shouldn't be our nation's story or legacy.** [**Every person with any sense of decency and conscience must speak out now. Join me in demanding the Trump administration immediately end this cruel policy of separating families. Add your name here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd791d7/2f5ea88d/70eb5873/2cbcfe2a/994184070/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/children-day-of-action?utm_source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&utm_campaign=children-day-of-action&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd791d7/2f5ea88d/70eb5873/2cbcfe2a/994184070/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/children-day-of-action?utm_source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&source=ema_2018-06-01_children-day-of-action&utm_campaign=children-day-of-action&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd791d7/2f5ea88d/70eb5873/2cbcfe29/994184070/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

name: Rapid Response @ Bateson HQ
subject: Russian-inspired censorship in CA-04
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Paul Smith is trying to bring dirty Russian tactics to CA-04, and we are calling him out.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_russiaca04?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180601_3_3&amount=25&recurring=auto [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_russiaca04?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180601_3_3&amount=25&recurring=auto]
Honestly, we wish we could bring you good news. This NPR story keeps getting weirder and weirder.
According to NPR, Smith claimed that he wanted all of his Facebook followers to be heard, but it was discovered that he regularly censors comments he doesn’t like, and on Twitter he completely blocks his opponents . He does all this to attack Regina and stop her people-powered movement. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_russiaca04?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180601_3_3&amount=25&recurring=auto]
Sound familiar?
What’s most alarming about this story is how one individual can amplify his voice on social media and manipulate thousands of people with falsehoods and dirty tricks.
This is exactly the sort of behavior that helped Donald Trump win in 2016. We can’t let Paul Smith get away with this. We have to fight back.
Please make a contribution right now so we can get our message out to voters and respond to these unfair attacks. Our goal is to raise $3,500 in the next 24 hours. name: Laura
subject: this isn't good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friends, this isn't good. We missed our May end-of-month goal yesterday - and with primary day coming up in a week and a half, it's honestly the worst possible moment to fall short.
_The Washington Post_ just reported that "Nevada is Democrats' best pickup opportunity" - but we can't win if we don't have the resources necessary to take on Dean Heller, Mitch McConnell, and their right-wing billionaire backers. [**Can you chip in $5 - or whatever you can - to help us catch up and start June as strong as possible?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd47c/4fbb2af3/71e458dd/5e8a0618/3202338454/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azcwMS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk701-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
